CSH.GreatWeapon.Name: Great Weapon Fighting
CSH.Settings.EnableGreatWeapon.Name: Enable Great Weapon Fighting
CSH.Settings.EnableGreatWeapon.Hint: Automatically raises the total of base damage dice for heavy melee weapons to 6 if the total is below 6 and the actor has the style.
CSH.Settings.RequireStrength13.Name: Require Strength 13+
CSH.Settings.RequireStrength13.Hint: When enabled, the style only applies to actors with Strength 13 or higher.
CSH.Settings.RequireStyleFeature.Name: Require style feature on actor
CSH.Settings.RequireStyleFeature.Hint: When enabled, the actor must have an item or feature named Бой большим оружием or Great Weapon Fighting.
CSH.Settings.ShowChatNote.Name: Show chat note
CSH.Settings.ShowChatNote.Hint: Adds a short note to the damage card when the module changes the base weapon dice result.
CSH.Settings.Debug.Name: Debug logging
CSH.Settings.Debug.Hint: Writes detailed Automated Features Helper messages to the browser console. Usually disabled.
CSH.SilverTongue.Name: Silver Tongue
CSH.SilverTongue.ChatNote: Silver Tongue: d20 result {original} counts as 10.
CSH.Settings.EnableSilverTongue.Name: Enable Silver Tongue
CSH.Settings.EnableSilverTongue.Hint: Automatically treats a d20 result of 1 to 9 as 10 for Charisma (Persuasion) and Charisma (Deception) checks if the actor has the feature.
Require Silver Tongue feature on actor
When enabled, the rule only applies to actors with an item or feature named Златоуст or Silver Tongue.
CSH.Settings.SilverTongueFeatureNames.Hi: Semicolon-separated accepted feature names. Example: Златоуст;Silver Tongue.
CSH.Settings.SilverTongueShowChatNote.Hi: Adds a short note to the check card when the module changes the d20 result to 10.
CSH.Corruption.Name: Corruption
CSH.Corruption.ChatNote: Corruption: {actor} gains a corruption charge (+{amount}) for spending a spell slot.
CSH.Settings.EnableCorruptionCharges.Hin: When an actor spends a spell slot of 1st level or higher, add 1 charge to the configured Corruption counter item.
CSH.Settings.CorruptionCounterNames.Name: Corruption counter item names
CSH.Settings.CorruptionCounterNames.Hint: Semicolon-separated list of valid counter item names. Example: Порча;Corruption.
CSH.Settings.CorruptionShowChatNote.Name: Show Corruption chat note
CSH.Settings.CorruptionShowChatNote.Hint: Create a short chat message when the module adds a corruption charge.
